docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS, STEPHEN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS, STEPHEN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS, STEPHEN DOES 1 TO 5
DECLARATION RE AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 76892794) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 76892794) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOODS, STEPHEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 175 SIXTH STREET, UNIT #511 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76892794)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE ($16.76/DAY) (TRANSACTION ID # 76952131) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76952131)
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 76952131) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS, STEPHEN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 76892794) AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS, STEPHEN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76892794), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION SERVED AUG-01-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS, STEPHEN
